main.description: Markdown text with optional rich-text facets. Owned by markpub.at (https://markpub.at) — this file is a local mirror for documentation/types, not an authored lexicon. Embedded inside at.markpub.markdown. Requested only ever populates `markdown`.

markdown.description: The raw markdown source, valid for the enclosing block's flavor.

textBlob.description: Optional blob holding the markdown, overriding `markdown` when present. Unused by Requested.

facets.description: Open union of rendered facets over byte ranges of the markdown. Unused by Requested (we re-render from source).

lenses.description: Open union of lenses translating between facet types. Unused by Requested.
